'''Garonnin''' was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] leader of [[House Garonnin]] and a [[Senex/Legends|Senex Lord]].

==Biography==
In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] he was an ally of [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]]. He was killed when [[Irek Ismaren]] cleaved him in half with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] after discovering they were betraying the Senex Lords by abandoning them to the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''.<ref name="CotJ" />

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
